Episodes.Title: Pilot
Episodes.Actors: Bryan Cranston, Anna Gunn, Aaron Paul
Episodes.Plot: Diagnosed with lung cancer, high-school chemistry teacher Walter White teams with ex-student Jesse to cook meth in an RV, using science--and sudden violence--to secure their first batch and escape two lethal dealers.

Episodes.Title: Cat's in the Bag...
Episodes.Actors: Bryan Cranston, Anna Gunn, Aaron Paul
Episodes.Plot: After their first drug deal goes terribly wrong, Walt and Jesse are forced to dispose a pair of corpses. Meanwhile, Skyler grows suspicious of her husband's activities.

Episodes.Title: ...And the Bag's in the River
Episodes.Actors: Bryan Cranston, Anna Gunn, Aaron Paul
Episodes.Plot: Walter is forced to make a life-altering decision as he and Jesse deal with the fallout of their actions. Meanwhile, Skyler's suspicions continue to grow, and Hank begins to take notice of Walter's unusual behavior.

Episodes.Title: Cancer Man
Episodes.Actors: Bryan Cranston, Anna Gunn, Aaron Paul
Episodes.Plot: Walt tells the rest of his family about his cancer. Jesse tries to make amends with his own parents.

Episodes.Title: Gray Matter
Episodes.Actors: Bryan Cranston, Anna Gunn, Aaron Paul
Episodes.Plot: Walter and Skyler attend a party at the home of his wealthy former colleagues, reigniting tensions over his past. Meanwhile, Jesse struggles to find legitimate work.

Episodes.Title: Crazy Handful of Nothin'
Episodes.Actors: Bryan Cranston, Anna Gunn, Aaron Paul
Episodes.Plot: With the side effects and cost of his treatment mounting, Walt demands that Jesse finds a wholesaler to buy their drugs - which lands him in trouble.

Episodes.Title: A No-Rough-Stuff-Type Deal
Episodes.Actors: Bryan Cranston, Anna Gunn, Aaron Paul
Episodes.Plot: Walt and Jesse try to up their game by making more of the crystal every week for Tuco. Unfortunately, some of the ingredients they need are not easy to find. Meanwhile, Skyler suspects her sister of shoplifting.
